summary: Iter21 — testing_agent_bench end-to-end VALIDATED. Backend pytest 6/6 PASS (proxy POST /api/eval/testing-agent-evals returns {jobs:[...]} on happy path, surfaces upstream error on empty body; POST /api/eval/datasets accepts dataset_type=testing_agent_bench with both minimal and full attribute sets; testing_agent_bench datasets present in list). Frontend Playwright: DatasetEditorModal — Step1 relabels to 'Production Job ID *' with helper text 'The prod job to fork…', Step2 shows HITL/Golden textareas with PhasedEditor HIDDEN, Step3 shows only agent_name + model_name with ALL forbidden attr testids absent, validations fire correct toasts ('HITL Input is required', 'Golden Output is required', 'Agent Name is required'), and the captured outbound POST body matches the spec EXACTLY (dataset_type=testing_agent_bench, name=`testing_agent_bench/<iid>`, problem_statement==HITL, natural_language_tests==Golden, attributes.{agent_name,model_name,prod_job_id} set, NO phases/test_cases/problem_set_ids). RunEvalModal — Step1 mixed-type warning [step1-mixed-types-warning] shows when testing_agent_bench + scratch_bench_phased selected together and Next is disabled with title 'Cannot mix testing_agent_bench with other dataset types'; Step2 shows [testing-agent-mode-banner], hides ALL of (eval-template-name, eval-agent-name-override, eval-cpus, eval-memory, eval-storage, toggle-exp-config) and keeps Group Run ID + User ID; Step3 Review card shows 'Mode: testing_agent_bench — infra from forked prod jobs'; Submit fires exactly ONE POST to /api/eval/testing-agent-evals (zero to /api/eval/jobs and zero to /api/eval/jobs-with-es), toast 'Submitted 1 testing-agent eval(s)' shown, navigation stays on /evals.

integration_issues.issue: Outbound request body does NOT contain `created_by` — the attachOwnership axios interceptor at /app/frontend/src/services/apiHelpers.js line 42 has an UNCONDITIONAL `return config;` that short-circuits the entire interceptor (comment: 'No need for permissions for now'). The spec calls for `created_by` to be injected by the interceptor on /testing-agent-evals. PRE-EXISTING condition that also affects /eval/jobs and other endpoints — not introduced by this iteration's diff. Harness currently accepts requests without created_by (200 OK observed).

issues: Benign ResizeObserver 'loop completed with undelivered notifications' overlay flashed during Confirm & Create — known react-resizable / shadcn issue, cosmetic only.

action_items: (optional, pre-existing) re-enable attachOwnership interceptor if/when created_by injection is required — remove the unconditional `return config;` on line 42 of /app/frontend/src/services/apiHelpers.js. Not blocking iter21 sign-off.
(optional, cosmetic) suppress the ResizeObserver overlay error in the dev runtime-error overlay; this is a known benign warning and does not affect functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend proxy at server.py:562 (`proxy_submit_testing_agent_eval`) correctly pass-throughs body to EVAL_API_BASE/api/v1/testing-agent-evals and surfaces upstream errors as HTTPException with upstream status — confirmed via pytest test_proxy_returns_jobs + test_proxy_surfaces_upstream_error.

DatasetEditorModal isTestingAgentBench branch correctly maps HITL → problem_statement and Golden → natural_language_tests, sets name = `${dataset_type}/${instance_id}`, omits problem_set_ids, phases, and test_cases — verified by network-intercept of POST /api/eval/datasets.

RunEvalModal isTestingAgentMode memo correctly wraps EphPicker/Template/Agent-override/Resources/Experiment-Config blocks so they DO NOT render when all selections are testing_agent_bench. Group Run ID + User ID remain outside the gated block.

Mixed-type guardrail uses both visual (rose banner) AND functional (Next disabled with explanatory title attribute) — correct UX. Same warning [data-testid='mixed-types-warning'] also wired on Step 2 per spec, though Step1 gating prevents users from reaching Step 2 in mixed state.
Pre-existing react/no-unescaped-entities lint errors in RunEvalModal.js (lines 210/211/657/820/1024) are NOT in scope per agent_to_agent_context_note.
Carry-over from iter19: server.py is ~1438 lines now; consider splitting into eval_proxy.py / auth.py modules.

DEAD CODE in /app/frontend/src/services/apiHelpers.js: lines 43-65 are unreachable due to `return config;` at line 42. Either delete the dead block or re-enable by removing line 42 — current state is confusing and contradicts the iter19 spec/tests which asserted created_by injection.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on functional acceptance criteria (all 14 scripted assertions PASS — labels, validations, payload shape, mixed-type guardrail, banner + gated fields, review card, submit routing). created_by missing from POST body is a pre-existing condition outside iter21 scope.

test_credentials: localStorage.acm_session_token = 'pw_emergent_gate_post' (user 0ee59a27-db9c-4647-aeee-f72173fcd757 / TEST_pw_user@emergent.com). Valid for 7 days from 2026-06-08 per /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created 2 datasets via the public API: testing_agent_bench/TEST_iter21_dataset_min_<run> and testing_agent_bench/TEST_iter21_dataset_full_<run>. Frontend Playwright created 1 dataset: testing_agent_bench/pw_iter21_<ts>. Two real testing-agent eval jobs were submitted to the harness during backend tests, and one during frontend test (with group_run_id pw_iter21_tab_<ts>-<auto-suffix>). Existing smoke-fork-1..5 datasets were preserved as instructed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To re-validate iter21: (1) run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_testing_agent_bench.py -v` — all 6 must pass; uses uuid suffix RUN_ID to avoid duplicate-key collisions on re-runs. (2) For UI, seed `localStorage.acm_session_token='pw_emergent_gate_post'` on `https://replay-browser-tests.internal.preview.emergentagent.com`, then exercise: Datasets → New Dataset → select 'Testing Agent Bench' → Step1 confirm 'Production Job ID *' label, Step2 confirm `[data-testid='dataset-hitl-input-textarea']` + `[data-testid='dataset-golden-output-textarea']`, Step3 confirm `[data-testid='attr-agent-name']` + `[data-testid='attr-model-name']`. Run Eval Modal: select smoke-fork-1 + an ecom_app_structured row, confirm `[data-testid='step1-mixed-types-warning']` + Next disabled. Deselect scratch row, advance: confirm `[data-testid='testing-agent-mode-banner']` and the absence of `[data-testid='eval-template-name'|'eval-agent-name-override'|'eval-cpus'|'eval-memory'|'eval-storage'|'toggle-exp-config']`. Submit and assert POST goes to /api/eval/testing-agent-evals only. Datasets list testids use the format `dataset-row-<instance_id>`; Run-Eval-modal items use `dataset-item-<type>/<instance_id>`.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature additions only. One out-of-scope finding flagged: attachOwnership interceptor is currently a no-op due to an unconditional early return — pre-existing across the whole eval client, not introduced by this iteration.
